zh.lifeSummary: William Wode於1515年出生在英國英格蘭賀特福爾黑費爾德。他於1547年1月29日與Agnes Prist在英國賀特福爾黑費爾德結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1552年11月23日在英國賀特福爾黑費爾德享年37歲，埋葬在英國賀特福爾黑費爾德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: William Wode于1515年出生在英国英格兰賀特福爾黑費爾德。他于1547年1月29日与Agnes Prist在英国賀特福爾黑費爾德结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1552年11月23日在英国賀特福爾黑費爾德享年37岁，埋葬在英国賀特福爾黑費爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Wode
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of   Wood  . — Note: The population figure published by the US Census Bureau for this surname in the year 2000 is as high as 312, while the figure for 2010 is supposedly lower than 100.

variants.name: Wood
meanings: English: mainly a topographic name for someone who lived in or by a wood, from Middle English wode ‘wood’ (Old English wudu). In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed cognates from other languages, such as French Bois and Polish Les .
English: in a few cases, a nickname for an eccentric or perhaps a violent person, from Middle English wode ‘frenzied, wild’ (Old English wōd).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: William Wode was born in 1515, in Therfield, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom. He married Agnes Prist on 29 January 1547, in Therfield, Hertfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 6 daughters. He died on 23 November 1552, in Therfield, Hertfordshire, England, at the age of 37, and was buried in Therfield, Hertfordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: William Wode est né en 1515, à Therfield, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il a épousé Agnes Prist le 29 janvier 1547, à Therfield, Hertfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé le 23 novembre 1552, à Therfield, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 37 ans, et a été enterré à Therfield, Hertfordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: William Wode wurde 1515 in Therfield, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren. Er hat am 29. Januar 1547 in Therfield, Hertfordshire, England Agnes Prist geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb am 23. November 1552 im Alter von 37 Jahren in Therfield, Hertfordshire, England und wurde in Therfield, Hertfordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: William Wode è nato il nel 1515 nel Therfield, Hertfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Lui sposato Agnes Prist il 29 gennaio 1547, nel Therfield, Hertfordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 23 novembre 1552, nel Therfield, Hertfordshire, England, all'età di 37 anni, e fu sepolto a Therfield, Hertfordshire, England.

ja.Ugborough, Devon, England: イギリスイギリスデボンウグボロウ

ja.lifeSummary: William Wodeは1515年にイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアスエルフィールドで生まれた。1547年1月29日にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアスエルフィールドでAgnes Pristと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1552年11月23日にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアスエルフィールドで37歳で死去し，イギリスハートフォードシュアイアスエルフィールドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Wode(은)는 1515년 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 서르필드에서 태어났다. 그는 1547년 1월 29일 영국 허트퍼드실르 서르필드에서 Agnes Prist(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1552년 11월 23일 영국 허트퍼드실르 서르필드에서 37세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 허트퍼드실르 서르필드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: William Wode nasceu em 1515, em Therfield, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele casou-se com Agnes Prist em 29 de janeiro de 1547, em Therfield, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu em 23 de novembro de 1552, em Therfield, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, com 37 anos, e foi sepultado em Therfield, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: William Wode родился в 1515 г. в местности тирфиелд, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Prist 29 января 1547 г. в местности тирфиелд, хиртфордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 6 дочерей. Он умер 23 ноября 1552 г. в местности тирфиелд, хиртфордшир, Англия в возрасте 37 лет и был похоронен в местности тирфиелд, хиртфордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: William Wode nació en 1515, en Therfield, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Se casó con Agnes Prist el 29 de enero de 1547, en Therfield, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 23 de noviembre de 1552, en Therfield, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 37 años, y fue sepultado en Therfield, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra.
